features.additionalInfo: Unlimited additional payments for variable loans and up to $10k additional repayments for Fixed home loans
Interest Only and P&I repayment options
A digital experience through a mobile app
Redraw of repaid principal above minimum required is available on variable rate loans
Up to 90% LVR (excluding LMI) for IO loans
Up to 95% LVR (including LMI) for P&I loans
Weekly, Fortnightly frequencies for all P&I loans. Monthly repayment frequency only for IO loans.

Available to owner occupiers and investors on all ME home loan products if you:  Apply from 15/06/2024, and settle within 120 days of the loan application date Switch your existing home loan from another lender Take out a home loan with a minimum size of $700k and maximum LVR of 80%

eligibility.additionalInfo: Be an Australian citizen or permanent resident or resident for tax purposes with an Australian residential address.
Be applying in personal name(s) with acceptable credit history – not as a company or a trust.
Earn a regular PAYG income (for example self-employed applicants are excluded and cannot earn a foreign income for tax purposes).
Cross-Collateralisation is not supported. We can only accept single security applications.
Looking to purchase a home or have an existing home loan with a residential property in Australia (any state)

fees.name: Paper Statement Fee
fees.additionalInfo: $4 every 6 months & for copies / interim statements

fees.name: Valuation Fee (for new applications)
fees.additionalInfo: At cost for valuations costs in excess of $300

fees.name: Valuation Fee (for post-settlement variations)
fees.additionalInfo: At cost for valuations costs in excess of $300

fees.name: Settlement Fee
fees.additionalInfo: Payable for completing settlement of your loans

fees.name: Application Fee
fees.additionalInfo: Payable for processing application of your loans. Charged at settlement

fees.name: Top up Fee
fees.additionalInfo: Payable when you apply to top up your loan (6 months or more after settlement) and we agree to increase

fees.name: Rate Lock Fee
fees.additionalInfo: Payable if you request to lock in a specific fixed rate prior to the end of your current fixed rate period.

fees.name: Security Release Fee
fees.additionalInfo: Payable when we agree (at your request) to discharge a security.

fees.name: Legal Review Fees - Standard
fees.additionalInfo: Payable for each document that the Lender is required to review, amend or prepare and which is categorised by the Lender as a standard document. A standard document may include but is not limited to: - review of a consent document, power of attorney or a caveat; or - amendment or preparation of a consent document, deed of covenant, confidentiality agreement,cross guarantee and indemnity, deed of subordination, fixed charge or a deed of priority.

fees.name: Late Payment Fee
fees.additionalInfo: Fee for each time we do not receive the Minimum Payment Due and any Overdue Amount by the payment due date, debited to your Account after the payment due date.

fees.name: Vouchers and other records for searching - General search
fees.additionalInfo: each hour (minimum $30) General search of records

fees.name: Vouchers and other records for searching - Privacy Act
fees.additionalInfo: each hour (GST inclusive) Privacy Act - access request

fees.name: Mortgagee Sale Fee
fees.additionalInfo: Charged for each property we hold as security for a loan facility where the lender commences mortgagee sale procedures (whether or not a sale is completed).

fees.name: Substitution of Security Fee
fees.additionalInfo: Payable if we agree to substitute one security for another security

fees.name: Variation Fee
fees.additionalInfo: Charged for any variations made to the loan that need documentation
